query:
-- First let's see what days are currently in the schedule_slots table
SELECT id, slot_date, DAYOFWEEK(slot_date) as dow, slot_type, title, capacity
FROM schedule_slots
WHERE slot_type = 'clinic_105'
ORDER BY slot_date
LIMIT 30;
